  • Uses of AbstractColor in microui.component

    Methods in microui.component that return AbstractColor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractColor
    MenuButton.getArrowColor()
    Gets the color of the arrow indicator for sub-menus.
    AbstractColor
    TextArea.getCursorColor()
    Gets the cursor color.
    AbstractColor
    TextField.getCursorColor()
    Gets the cursor color.
    AbstractColor
    TextField.getHintColor()
    Gets the hint text color.
    AbstractColor
    LabeledCheckBox.getHoverColor()
    Gets the color used for hover effects.
    final AbstractColor
    Button.getImageColor()
    Gets the tint color applied to the button's image.
    AbstractColor
    Knob.getIndicatorColor()
    Gets the color used for the indicator arc.
    final AbstractColor
    CheckBox.getMarkColor()
    Gets the color used to draw the check mark or indicator.

    LabeledCheckBox.getMarkColor()
    Gets the color used for the check mark.
    AbstractColor
    MenuButton.getOpenStateIndicatorColor()
    Gets the color of the open state indicator.
    final AbstractColor
    Slider.getProgressColor()
    Gets the fill color of the progress indicator.
    final AbstractColor
    Slider.getProgressStrokeColor()
    Gets the stroke color (border color) of the progress indicator.

    TextArea.getSelectionColor()
    Gets the selection highlight color.

    TextField.getSelectionColor()
    Gets the selection highlight color.

    Gets the color of the button's text.

    Gets the color of the ripple effects on the thumb.

    Scroll.getThumbStrokeColor()
    Gets the stroke color (border color) of the thumb.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Button.setImageColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the tint color to apply to the button's image.

    Sets the color used for the indicator arc.

    Sets the background color for all items in this menu.

    Sets the text color for all items in this menu.

  • Uses of AbstractColor in microui.core.style

    Subclasses of AbstractColor in microui.core.style
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractLerpedColor
    An abstract base class for colors that interpolate between two other colors over time.
    class 
    Color
    Concrete implementation of AbstractColor representing a solid RGBA color.
    final class 
    LerpedColor
    A concrete implementation of AbstractLerpedColor that uses a condition to control the direction of color interpolation.
    class 
    LerpedLoopColor
    A continuously looping interpolated color that automatically cycles between start and end colors.
    Methods in microui.core.style that return AbstractColor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractColor
    Stroke.getColor()
    Returns the current stroke color.
    Methods in microui.core.style with parameters of type AbstractColor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Stroke.setColor(AbstractColor color)
    Sets the stroke color.
    Constructors in microui.core.style with parameters of type AbstractColor
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractLerpedColor(AbstractColor start, AbstractColor end)
    Constructs a new interpolated color with the specified start and end colors.
     
    Color(AbstractColor color)
    Constructs a Color by copying components from another AbstractColor.
     
    LerpedColor(AbstractColor start, AbstractColor end, BooleanSupplier condition)
    Constructs a new LerpedColor with specified start and end colors, and a condition that controls animation direction.
     
    LerpedLoopColor(AbstractColor start, AbstractColor end)
    Constructs a new looping interpolated color with the specified start and end colors.
     
    Stroke(AbstractColor color)
    Constructs a Stroke with specified color and default weight.
     
    Stroke(AbstractColor color, float weight)
    Constructs a Stroke with specified color and weight.

  • Uses of AbstractColor in microui.core.style.theme

    Methods in microui.core.style.theme that return AbstractColor
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getBackgroundColor()
    Returns the background color for containers and main UI areas.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getBackgroundColor()
    Returns the dark background color for containers.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getBackgroundColor()
    Returns an animated looping gradient for the background.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getBackgroundColor()
    Returns a medium gray for backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getBackgroundColor()
    Returns a very light gray for backgrounds.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getButtonTextColor()
    Returns the color for text displayed on buttons.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getButtonTextColor()
    Returns the medium gray color for button text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getButtonTextColor()
    Returns a light gray color for button text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getButtonTextColor()
    Returns a dark gray for button text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getButtonTextColor()
    Returns pure black for button text.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getCursorColor()
    Returns the color for text cursor/caret in editable text fields.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getCursorColor()
    Returns a near-white color for text cursor/caret.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getCursorColor()
    Returns a light blue-gray for text cursor/caret.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getCursorColor()
    Returns pure black for text cursor/caret.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getCursorColor()
    Returns a near-black color for text cursor/caret.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getEditableBackgroundColor()
    Returns the background color for editable text fields and areas.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getEditableBackgroundColor()
    Returns medium gray for editable text field backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getEditableBackgroundColor()
    Returns a light gray with low opacity for editable backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getEditableBackgroundColor()
    Returns a very light gray for editable text field backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getEditableBackgroundColor()
    Returns pure white for editable text field backgrounds.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getEditableTextColor()
    Returns the color for editable text (text fields, text areas, etc.).
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getEditableTextColor()
    Returns pure white for editable text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getEditableTextColor()
    Returns a very light blue-gray for editable text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getEditableTextColor()
    Returns pure black for editable text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getEditableTextColor()
    Returns pure black for editable text.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getHoverColor()
    Returns the color for hover effects when users mouse over interactive elements.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getHoverColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent light gray for hover effects.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getHoverColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent cyan-blue for hover effects.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getHoverColor()
    Returns a medium gray with medium opacity for hover effects.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getHoverColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent light blue for hover effects.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getMenuButtonItemColor()
    Returns the background color for menu button items.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getMenuButtonItemColor()
    Returns pure black for menu button item backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getMenuButtonItemColor()
    Returns a medium dark gray for menu button item backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getMenuButtonItemColor()
    Returns a dark gray for menu button item backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getMenuButtonItemColor()
    Returns a very light gray for menu button item backgrounds.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getMenuButtonItemTextColor()
    Returns the text color for menu button items.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getMenuButtonItemTextColor()
    Returns pure white for menu button item text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getMenuButtonItemTextColor()
    Returns pure white for menu button item text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getMenuButtonItemTextColor()
    Returns pure white for menu button item text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getMenuButtonItemTextColor()
    Returns pure black for menu button item text.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getPrimaryColor()
    Returns the primary accent color used for highlights and primary actions.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getPrimaryColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent light gray for primary accents.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getPrimaryColor()
    Returns an animated looping gradient for primary accents.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getPrimaryColor()
    Returns a dark gray for primary accents.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getPrimaryColor()
    Returns a medium gray for primary accents.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getRipplesColor()
    Returns the color for ripple animation effects on click/touch interactions.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getRipplesColor()
    Returns a very transparent gray for ripple animations.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getRipplesColor()
    Returns a very transparent gray-blue for ripple animations.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getRipplesColor()
    Returns a light gray with medium opacity for ripple animations.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getRipplesColor()
    Returns pure white for ripple animations.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getSelectColor()
    Returns the color for selected items or highlighted selections.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getSelectColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent dark blue for selection highlighting.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getSelectColor()
    Returns a medium gray for selection highlighting.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getSelectColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent cyan for selection highlighting.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getSelectColor()
    Returns a semi-transparent blue for selection highlighting.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getStrokeColor()
    Returns the color for strokes/borders around UI elements.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getStrokeColor()
    Returns pure black for strokes and borders.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getStrokeColor()
    Returns a light blue-gray color for strokes with medium transparency.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getStrokeColor()
    Returns a medium gray for strokes and borders.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getStrokeColor()
    Returns pure black for strokes and borders.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getTextViewColor()
    Returns the color for non-editable text elements (labels, headers, etc.).
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getTextViewColor()
    Returns the light gray color for non-editable text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getTextViewColor()
    Returns a near-white color with high opacity for text views.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getTextViewColor()
    Returns a very dark gray for text views.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getTextViewColor()
    Returns pure black for non-editable text.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getTooltipBackgroundColor()
    Returns the background color for tooltip popups.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getTooltipBackgroundColor()
    Returns an animated gradient for tooltip backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getTooltipBackgroundColor()
    Returns a light blue-gray for tooltip backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getTooltipBackgroundColor()
    Returns a light gray for tooltip backgrounds.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getTooltipBackgroundColor()
    Returns an animated gradient for tooltip backgrounds.
    abstract AbstractColor
    AbstractTheme.getTooltipTextColor()
    Returns the text color for tooltip popups.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeBlack.getTooltipTextColor()
    Returns a complex animated gradient for tooltip text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGlass.getTooltipTextColor()
    Returns pure black for tooltip text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeGray.getTooltipTextColor()
    Returns a dark gray for tooltip text.
    AbstractColor
    ThemeWhite.getTooltipTextColor()
    Returns a complex animated gradient for tooltip text.
